def negative_expensive_sort_key_recomputed_without_preprojection():
    rule_id = "expensive_sort_key_recomputed_without_preprojection"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag repeated expensive key computation during sorting when values could be precomputed once."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
